PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James A. Schorner, in pro per, appeared by CourtCall.

Mr. Schorner confirmed that he is a licensed attorney practicing in Florida, that he has familiarized himself with California Probate law and procedures, and that he is confident in his ability the probate of this estate without the assistance of California legal counsel. He stated that the estate assets consist of a condo valued at $500,000, and $100,000 in bank accounts. It was his opinion that the estate could be probated fairly quickly. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and appointment of James A. Schorner executor of the estate (subject to review of the order). Bond was fixed at $10,000.00. A Status Hearing re closing of estate was set for September 11, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Continued To Mar-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
